purpose: Mechanical seed rules for Project Phase 1a feature routing. Rules are cumulative; later review may add or remove assignments.

rules.description: Repository metadata and housekeeping.
Generated OpenWrt build configuration files.
rules.review_reason: Build config is a clue only; do not treat it as hardware truth.

rules.description: Base feed configuration.
Kernel build configuration menu.
OpenWrt package build Makefile integration.
OpenWrt host tool build logic.
OpenWrt helper scripts.
Image construction helper scripts and commands.
rules.review_reason: Image helper changes can affect bootable artifacts.

rules.description: MediaTek TF-A packaging and boot firmware build.
rules.review_reason: Boot chain files need cluster review.

rules.description: MediaTek U-Boot package, target, and patches.
rules.review_reason: U-Boot files need boot cluster review.

rules.description: U-Boot patch files may carry DTS, env, bootmenu, recovery, or storage behavior.
rules.review_reason: Inspect inner U-Boot targets before migration.

rules.description: U-Boot environment tools and environment placement.
rules.review_reason: Environment layout is board/storage sensitive.

rules.description: MediaTek Filogic image recipes and DTS selection.
rules.review_reason: Image recipe files define build artifacts and package defaults.

rules.description: OpenWrt board.d network defaults.
rules.review_reason: Network defaults are board-specific and migration critical.

rules.description: OpenWrt board.d LED defaults.
rules.review_reason: LED defaults depend on board wiring.

rules.description: Platform sysupgrade and compatibility behavior.
rules.review_reason: Sysupgrade behavior is storage and board critical.

rules.description: Base-files board detection, uci-defaults, hotplug, and init integration.
rules.review_reason: Base-files changes may be board-specific.

rules.description: Device tree source, include, and overlay files.
rules.review_reason: DTS files require cluster-level hardware review.

rules.description: DTS storage device clues.
rules.review_reason: Storage details require DTS cluster review.

rules.description: DTS fixed partition or rootfs layout clues.
rules.review_reason: Partition layout needs storage review.

rules.description: DTS factory/nvmem data clues.
rules.review_reason: Factory/nvmem data needs board-level review.

rules.description: DTS factory/nvmem/MAC-address identity clues.
rules.review_reason: DTS identity/nvmem routing needs board-level review.

rules.description: DTS network topology clues.
rules.review_reason: Network topology requires DTS and wired-network cluster review.

rules.description: DTS MDIO bus clues.
rules.review_reason: MDIO topology needs wired-network review.

rules.description: DTS Ethernet PHY and multi-rate link clues.
rules.review_reason: Ethernet PHY topology needs wired-network review.

rules.description: DTS SFP cage, detect GPIO, and SFP I2C clues.
rules.review_reason: SFP DTS behavior needs wired-network review.

rules.description: DTS 10G PHY, Aquantia, CUX3410, or AS21xxx clues.
rules.review_reason: 10G PHY DTS behavior needs wired-network review.

rules.description: DTS PHY firmware-name clues.
rules.review_reason: PHY firmware reference needs wired-network review.

rules.description: DTS MaxLinear switch and DSA tagging clues.
rules.review_reason: MxL/DSA DTS behavior needs wired-network review.

rules.description: DTS SFP/RJ45 combo clues.
rules.review_reason: Combo behavior needs dedicated wired-network review.

rules.description: DTS PCIe slot/controller clues.
rules.review_reason: PCIe slot/controller behavior needs hardware review.

rules.description: DTS Wi-Fi device or slot clues.
rules.review_reason: Wi-Fi slot/device behavior needs hardware review.

rules.description: DTS cellular, SIM, modem, or WWAN clues.
rules.review_reason: Cellular/SIM behavior needs cluster review.

rules.description: DTS LED clues.
rules.review_reason: LED keyword routing may over-tag exact LED role.

rules.description: DTS power LED clues.
rules.review_reason: Power LED role needs board-level review.

rules.description: DTS button/input clues.
rules.review_reason: Button keyword routing may over-tag exact button role.

rules.description: DTS reset button clues.
rules.review_reason: Reset button role needs board-level review.

rules.description: DTS WPS button clues.
rules.review_reason: WPS button role needs board-level review.

rules.description: DTS thermal zone clues.
rules.review_reason: Thermal keyword routing may over-tag exact thermal role.

rules.description: DTS fan/PWM fan clues.
rules.review_reason: Fan keyword routing may over-tag exact fan role.

rules.description: MediaTek target kernel patches with unknown inner target.
rules.review_reason: Use inner patch target paths to refine feature routing.

rules.description: Kernel patch touches DTS or bindings.
rules.review_reason: DTS/binding kernel patches require cluster review.

rules.description: Kernel patch touches PHY, MDIO, or phylink code.
rules.review_reason: PHY/PCS patches are wired-network critical.

rules.description: Kernel patch touches 10G PHY, Aquantia, CUX3410, or AS21xxx behavior.
rules.review_reason: 10G PHY patches need wired-network review.

rules.description: Kernel patch touches SFP module detection, SFP GPIOs, or SFP cage behavior.
rules.review_reason: SFP patches need wired-network review.

rules.description: Kernel patch touches SFP/RJ45 combo or mux behavior.
rules.review_reason: SFP/RJ45 combo behavior needs dedicated wired-network review.

rules.description: Kernel patch touches PCS or SerDes mode handling.
rules.review_reason: PCS patches are wired-network critical.

rules.description: Kernel patch touches DSA or switch code.
rules.review_reason: Switch/DSA patches are wired-network critical.

rules.description: Kernel patch touches MediaTek Ethernet MAC code.
rules.review_reason: MediaTek Ethernet patches need wired-network review.

rules.description: Kernel patch touches PPE or flow offload code.
rules.review_reason: PPE/flow offload belongs after basic network correctness.

rules.description: Kernel patch touches HNAT code.
rules.review_reason: HNAT acceleration belongs late in migration order.

rules.description: Kernel patch touches TOPS offload code.
rules.review_reason: TOPS offload belongs late in migration order.

rules.description: Kernel patch touches WED Wi-Fi offload code.
rules.review_reason: WED/offload belongs late in migration order.

rules.description: Kernel patch touches MTD, UBI, NMBM, NAND, NOR, or partition code.
rules.review_reason: Storage patch matched broad storage clues; precise storage tags are seeded by narrower rules.

rules.description: Kernel patch touches SPI-NAND or NAND boot/storage support.
rules.review_reason: SPI-NAND/NAND patches affect boot and storage media support.

rules.description: Kernel patch touches SPI-NOR or NOR boot/storage support.
rules.review_reason: SPI-NOR/NOR patches affect boot and storage media support.

rules.description: Kernel patch touches UBI, UBIFS, rootfs, or root device behavior.
rules.review_reason: UBI/rootfs patches affect boot and sysupgrade behavior.

rules.description: Kernel patch touches NMBM behavior.
rules.review_reason: NMBM patches affect SPI-NAND storage layout.

rules.description: Kernel patch touches USB bus/controller code.
rules.review_reason: USB bus/controller patches need bus review.

rules.description: Kernel patch touches PCIe bus/controller code.
rules.review_reason: PCIe bus/controller patches need bus review.

rules.description: Kernel patch touches I2C bus/controller code.
rules.review_reason: I2C bus/controller patches need bus review.

rules.description: Kernel patch touches SPI bus/controller code.
rules.review_reason: SPI bus/controller patches need bus review.

rules.description: Kernel patch touches GPIO controller or GPIO control code.
rules.review_reason: GPIO bus/controller patches need bus review.

rules.description: Kernel patch touches MDIO bus/controller code.
rules.review_reason: MDIO bus/controller patches need wired-network review.

rules.description: Kernel patch touches crypto/EIP acceleration.
rules.review_reason: Crypto acceleration belongs late in migration order.

rules.description: Added or modified PHY driver sources.
rules.review_reason: PHY driver files are wired-network critical.

rules.description: Added or modified 10G PHY driver sources.
rules.review_reason: 10G PHY driver files need wired-network review.

rules.description: PHY driver sources that reference runtime firmware loading.
rules.review_reason: PHY firmware loading needs wired-network review.

rules.description: Added or modified DSA/switch driver sources.
rules.review_reason: DSA/switch driver files are wired-network critical.

rules.description: Added or modified MediaTek Ethernet driver sources.
rules.review_reason: Ethernet driver files are wired-network critical.

rules.description: MediaTek Ethernet driver sources with PPE/flow offload clues.
rules.review_reason: PPE/flow offload needs acceleration review.

rules.description: Added or modified USB host/controller sources.
rules.review_reason: USB controller behavior may affect expansion and cellular devices.

rules.description: 10G PHY packages and PHY firmware blobs.
rules.review_reason: PHY firmware/package behavior is hardware-specific.

rules.description: OpenWrt kernel module package definitions.
rules.review_reason: Module definitions need feature-specific review.

rules.description: mt76 driver tree, patches, and supporting files.
rules.review_reason: mt76 changes need wireless cluster review.

rules.description: mt76 runtime firmware blobs.
rules.review_reason: Firmware file selection needs wireless cluster review.

rules.description: mt76 EEPROM/calibration blobs or handling.
rules.review_reason: Wi-Fi EEPROM/calibration handling is board-specific.

rules.description: mt76 WED/offload clues.
rules.review_reason: WED/offload belongs late in migration order.

rules.description: mac80211 package, patches, and backports.
rules.review_reason: Bulk mac80211 changes should be reviewed by wireless cluster.

rules.description: Wireless regulatory database or regdomain changes.
rules.review_reason: Regulatory behavior requires careful review.

rules.description: hostapd package, patches, source overlay, and build integration.
rules.review_reason: hostapd patch stack is large and needs wireless cluster review.

rules.description: hostapd ucode/ubus runtime integration.
rules.review_reason: hostapd ucode/ubus behavior affects runtime control.

rules.description: hostapd MLO/802.11be clues.
rules.review_reason: MLO behavior needs wireless cluster review.

rules.description: OpenWrt Wi-Fi scripts and netifd/ucode integration.
rules.review_reason: Wi-Fi scripts affect runtime device setup.

rules.description: iw utility patches and nl80211 sync.
rules.review_reason: iw changes may track nl80211/mac80211 feature exposure.

rules.description: Generic OpenWrt network service defaults.
rules.review_reason: Generic network changes may be baseline mismatch or policy.

rules.description: Target base network config defaults.
rules.review_reason: Target network config needs runtime-default review.

rules.description: Target base firewall config defaults.
rules.review_reason: Target firewall config needs runtime-default review.

rules.description: Target base network/firewall config contains WWAN defaults.
rules.review_reason: WWAN defaults need cellular/network review.

rules.description: Flowtable, netfilter, or nft-related package/library support.
rules.review_reason: Flowtable/netfilter changes affect network defaults and acceleration.

rules.description: Cellular userspace packages and modem support clues.
rules.review_reason: Cellular keyword routing may over-tag.

rules.description: MediaTek OP-TEE package and boot firmware support.
rules.review_reason: OP-TEE handling belongs to boot chain review.

rules.description: Miscellaneous MTK package sources and support utilities.
rules.review_reason: Miscellaneous MTK package needs feature-specific review.

rules.description: Boot count reset service/package.
rules.review_reason: Boot count behavior belongs to recovery review.

rules.description: Wi-Fi firmware/blob files listed by the diffset.
rules.review_reason: Wi-Fi binary firmware needs package-specific classification.

rules.description: fstools storage, rootfs, overlay, and dual-boot support.
rules.review_reason: fstools storage behavior affects boot and sysupgrade.

rules.description: Init scripts and service entry points.
rules.review_reason: Init services need cluster-specific classification.

rules.description: OpenWrt target kernel config and target makefile.
rules.review_reason: Target config must be reviewed with target bring-up.

rules.description: MediaTek clock and reset controller sources or bindings.
rules.review_reason: Clock/reset files belong to SoC base hardware review.

rules.description: MediaTek pinctrl and GPIO controller sources.
rules.review_reason: Pinctrl files belong to SoC base hardware review.

rules.description: RA NAT/HNAT header or related networking acceleration code.
rules.review_reason: HNAT acceleration belongs late in migration order.

rules.description: Target base-files scripts and init integration not covered by board.d/sysupgrade rules.
rules.review_reason: Target base-files scripts need cluster-specific classification.

rules.description: Renamed or copied files require review because path movement can affect patch order or build behavior.
rules.review_reason: Rename/copy status requires review even when feature tags are seeded.
